Thanks for contributing to @bonyanoss/bonyan-api!

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences describing what changes and why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New resource / endpoint
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Build / CI / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes (new tests added when behavior changed)
- [ ] Public API changes are reflected in the README
- [ ] No breaking change, **or** the change is noted under "Breaking changes" below

## Breaking changes

<!-- If this PR breaks an existing API, list every removed/renamed export and how users should migrate. Otherwise write "None". -->

None
